feed.title: SAP Community - SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central
feed.subtitle: SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: When I enter the position in the system, it loads twice in Success Factors
entry.content:
Hi Experts, 

I'm facing a weird behavior in our system. When I select the position during "Job change" the system loads the position information the 1st time and in a 2nd time the system erase the position.

I've tried to check if there are any rules causing this. Association can cause this?

Have you ever experienced anything like this, or do you have any tips? I'm evaluating the existing rules.

Regards

#successfactors

entry.title: question, is there any medical management module integrated to SAP Employee central or SAP BTP?
entry.content:
Hello experts, we would like to know if there is a module where you can manage medical appointments, medication control, etc. at medical office level for an industry.
Not an independent medical center or hospital, but a small internal clinic within an industry.

Is there any solution that integrates to EMPLOYEE CENTRAL or any application already made in sap BTP or SAP independent module.

I would appreciate your comments

entry.title: Re: Not yet received SAP digital certification badge mail
entry.content:
Hey,

I have cleared the SAP certification exam thr81 on 9th April 2024. However have not yet received my digital badge mail. What should i do? Please help me.

entry.title: EC Job Info - custom field for Compensation portlet
entry.content:
Dear experts,

We would need to configure in Employee Central a business rule which can provide for our managers access to the Compensation portlet. For this case we would use a custom field from Job Info portlet (*Manager has salary access containing values like yes/no) which would need to trigger the access to the Compensation Information portlet. 

If you had any requirements for creating business rule which can support for the cross portlets access, I would appreciate your recommendations.  

Best regards,

Eli

entry.title: Pay statement visibility for former employees
entry.content:
Hello,

We are exploring on how we can safely enable the visibility for our former employees to view their last pay statements. Does anyone have a KBA they can share ? Also if anyone has the same requirements implemented on their SF system, can you share the best practice and any learning curve you experienced?

I appreciate it.

entry.title: Stay Current Assessments for SFSF Certifications
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

Are there any changes regarding the mandatory stay current assessments for each certification in SFSF?

We used to take 2 stay current assessments / year corresponding to each SFSF release. Is a little bit confusing now the communication and seems that the validity of the certificate is now 12 months,  not until the next release certifications deadlines.

Do you know what exactly means now that the SAP Certification program is changing for SuccessFactors and what you need to get and stay certified?  (Message in learning hub)

SAP Certification Transformation Brochure

Thank you in advance!

Alexandra

entry.title: What is the recommended Application-Specific rule scenario to raise an error message in EC?
entry.content:
With the deprecation of the creation of Basic Rule scenario, what is the scenario we are to use when we need to generate an error or warning message in Employee Central? Perhaps we have overlooked it, but it seems that only Basic Scenario has "Raise Message" option under "Then" condition. 

Thanks!

entry.title: Wrong manager is receiving the notification for document routing.
entry.content:
Hi,

Wrong Employee received the mail notification which was generated after the document routed to next step in route map. Attaching the email received in the attachment.

Please note that there were two managers with same name however the employee IDs were different for them. So why the system is populating the mail to incorrect Manager in the email. Kindly confirm the root cause, also confirm how this issue can be avoided in the future.

issue in Requesters words: 

 As discussed in the call the user David Martin (438987), received the Document Routing Notice on Monday, Apr 15th for the SR form which belongs to another user David Martin (513255). The details are attached. The only common thing is their names, the e-mail addresses are different obviously. Could you please check how come the notification is sent to the wrong user? How are the recipients defined in the system for this notification?

Thanks,

Sneha

entry.title: Set up Pension Payout with EC - EC Payroll P2P integration
entry.content:
Hello!

Please share your experience with handling pension payouts in EC-ECPay point-to-point integration.

There is no information in the master implementaton guide for ECPay on how to define and set appropiate Event Reasons in EC that allow the replication to genereate an action with ERP code 14 and employee status "retired".

I found two promissing approaches in terms of EC (without direct relation to ECPay) but both did not bring the expected result:

1) Enhanced Pension Handling Using Job Information with Same Employment

I created a custom Event Reason "Retirement with Pension Payout" linked to the 05 - Data Change Event in EC and did the code mapping on Event Reason to Action Reason level but the replication will always consider the SAP standard Event mapping of EC Code 05 to ERP Action 02 - Organizational Change. This is probably because ECPay P2P integration expects a 1:1 mapping of EC Event and ECPay Action.

2) enable EC functionality for Pension Payouts

This linked KBA describes how to enable Pension Payout Details Portlet in People Profil under Admin Center > Manage Employee Central Settings > Pension Payouts
However, this feature is not available in my EC instance (Preview with Rel. 2405)

 

I would appreciate any help or guidance on this matter.

Regards,

Andreas

entry.title: I don't see the Organization or Reporting Line blocks in the new People Profile Spotlight view.
entry.content: I don't see the Organization or Reporting Line blocks in the new People Profile Spotlight view.  There are other block that don't appear like the Skills and Competencies, but I expected that because we don't have those set up.  I did expect to see the Organization or Reporting Line blocks for all employees.  Is there something that needs to be configured for these blocks?

entry.title: Hide specific competencies/Skills from employee groups
entry.content:
Hi there,

We're currently in the process of building out our Talent Intelligence Hub, adding in new custom competencies and skills around certain roles.

However, we want make it that with certain roles cannot see certain competencies in their library. I've tried to dig into the reading, but it seems our only option is to make these attributes active or inactive.

Are there ways to do this at all?

Kind regards,

Antonis

entry.title: Issue with retrieving job details of onboardee (new hire)
entry.content: Hello, i am trying to get the job details of an onboardee (new hire) before they get hired in EC. Once onboardee personal information and hire details are entered in ONB 'Review New Hire Data' & 'Provide Additional Data Step', i can see EmpEmployment details, National ID, Email, and Phone number, however PerPersonal (Biographical) and EmpJob (Job Informaition) entities are missing when querying using OData or Integration Center.

entry.title: How to change a date format when exporting employee time sap successfactors
entry.content: i am trying to change the format on import and export date ( to export Employee time) from MM/DD/YYYY to DD/MM/YYYY can you kindly assist

entry.title: 1H 2024 Release Issue - Disappear the text "Select the action to perform" in Import and Export Page
entry.content: After H1 2024 release disappear text "Select the action to perform" in import and export page.

entry.title: Issue with new HRIS Element Rule Scenarios
entry.content: The new HRIS Element Business Rule Scenarios are limited to being triggered by only one Event Type. I find this very limiting, and have created a Request in Customer influence that I'm hoping others will vote for: Do not limit HRIS Element Business Rule Scenarios to be triggered by only one Event Type

entry.title: Home page approvals tile showing job title and not position title
entry.content:
Hello,

   For any Employee related workflow task, where that shows up in Quick Cards Approvals tile on the home page it is displaying Employee name and their Job title instead of Position title. Once the task is clicked, it navigates to Workflow details page and display position title correctly..

  Please let me know if this can be changed to display position title instead of job title on the home page

entry.title: Issues with Deceased status in EC & POC
entry.content:
Hi,

We have had EC and position management for several years and never had these issues with our deceased employees until about a month ago. The picklist employee-status includes a Deceased status. I do not think this is a unique set up. However, in the last month (so not release related) in Production we are facing issues and one resolution causes another issue. Conflicting KB articles with conflicting resolutions. KB article 3410318 - Unable to search inactive employees with custom employee status - Employee Central  https://me.sap.com/notes/3410318/E and KB article 3253287 - The employee is inactive with employee status in Job information as 'Deceased', but Position Org Chart is filled  https://me.sap.com/notes/3253287/E

Details on employee-status picklist non-unique external code:

If non-unique code = T

Then the POC does not show the deceased employee. Good.

But then I cannot proxy or search for some employees. Not good.

If non-unique code = T1 (or any other unique value)

Then the POC shows the deceased employee as in the position. Not good.

I can proxy and search for all employees. Good.

It has been horrible experience with SAP Support. I have two open cases and they keep saying it's not me, open a case with them, between EC team and Platform team. I have escalated one of the tickets today. It has been a month. This is just cruel. To be able to see a deceased employee (a friend to some employees) on the Position Org Chart or the regular Org Chart depending on which way I flip the non-unique external code, is horrible. I cannot fix this and have been asking for help from SAP Support and there does not seem to be any resolution. 

Is anyone else facing this?

Julie

entry.title: To take the previous pay component Amount in Appointment Letter in document generation
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

One of my customer has this following ask to fetch the previous pay component(Basic) Amount in Appointment Letter in document generation.

In Employee Central we only have Monthly Basic pay component.

We need to maintain the same in appointment letter. Can we take the last amount of Basic pay component which was there during hire date of employee.

For eg- An employee got hired on 6 june 2021 & the BASIC was 20000. So in Appointment letter we need that 20000 amount as his BASIC Amount, not the revised details.

 

Please let us know the feasibility.

Thanks

entry.title: Unable to translate the classic view menu tab.
entry.content:
Hi experts

Tab (Goals) in Classic View of report centre cannot be translated. I downloaded the language packs but cannot find the tab name in both English and Spanish.

I used the English debug, and found that it is referred to as Objectives, yet I cannot find it in both language packs mentioned above.

When I search Objectives or Goals in text replacement, I still can't find the tab. 

I will appreciate your input.

entry.title: Is First Time Manager ()
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I'm trying to build an OnChange rule that would update a custom string to help us flag new managers and design some training around that.

I've made it as so, which then would be added as a change rule to the custom field i have in jobinfo under "New Manager" - but of course i just get blank values. 

Any idea if I have made a mistake somewhere?

 

Kind regards,

Antonis
